hero.stat_1_label: Technical and business track record; the name recalls Clipper Summer87 and software built for real problems.

origin.label: The origin of Summer87
origin.title: The origin
origin.teaser: Summer87 is born as a tribute to a pivotal era in the history of software.
origin.e1: In the late 1980s, while we still worked in environments such as MS-DOS, BASIC, COBOL, Fortran, dBase III, or WordStar, Clipper Summer87 emerged: a new way to build software—more powerful, more approachable, and more focused on delivering real solutions.
origin.e2: I was part of that moment.
origin.e3: Independently, I developed one of the first electronic agendas in Uruguay for Federal Express, at a time when solutions like Lotus were common in the United States.
origin.e4: It was an era where “typing code” meant building from scratch. At the same time, I was part of the birth of a leading company, “Memory Computación,” where a key chapter began in understanding how businesses work, as a Functional Analyst. Every company, a world of its own.
origin.e5: Then came the chapter of sharing knowledge: I had the privilege of teaching in the Systems Analyst program at the Universitario Autónomo del Sur (today part of UDE).
origin.e6: Today, that same vision evolves into a new chapter: building intelligent business engines powered by artificial intelligence, data, and strategy.
origin.closing_line: We are not looking to simply adapt to change, but to understand it earlier—and turn it into concrete opportunities for those who want to stay one step ahead.

services.label: Services
services.headline: Three practice lines.
services.subheadline: Three integrated lines to grow with less commercial and operational friction: strategy, information architecture, and measurable execution.
services.methodology_footer: Consulting methodology · decisions with real impact
services.s1_subtitle: Behavior, narrative, and sales process in sync
services.s1_desc: We refine how your organization sells: language, funnel stages, objections, and handoffs between marketing and sales—with emphasis on conversations that move forward and metrics you define with us.
services.s2_subtitle: AI, data, and automation with business sense
services.s2_desc: We turn knowledge into decision systems: process diagnosis, pragmatic integrations, agents or rules where appropriate, and dashboards that answer real leadership and operations questions.
services.s3_subtitle: BI and tailored software when it creates leverage
services.s3_desc: Reporting, alerts, and operational flows aligned to real processes; modules when a generic ERP does not fit—with traceability, permissions, and an agreed implementation roadmap.
s3_features: Design around processes and business questions

about.label: How we think at Summer87
about.headline: Experience and
about.desc_1: We work with teams that need to organize data, automate the repeatable, and decide better: neuroventas, artificial intelligence, business intelligence, and proprietary software when it creates leverage.
about.desc_2: We integrate strategy, intelligence, and operations. We turn knowledge into decision systems—processes and tools aligned to the business, without promises we cannot stand behind.
about.desc_3: The 87 in the name is not an invented statistic: it is an explicit link to Clipper Summer87 and to a tradition of serious, problem-driven software.
about.value_1_desc: We help locate where the opportunity sits—in the process, the data, or the model—and prioritize with a business-first lens.
about.value_2_desc: We move from diagnosis to pragmatic implementation: integrations, dashboards, automation, and sound governance practices.
about.value_3_desc: Clear deliverables, explicit responsibilities, and consultative support—without fluff.
about.visual_text: The name recalls an era where programming meant building real solutions. That same rigor guides how we design business engines today.
about.testimonial_quote: We are not looking to simply adapt to change, but to understand it earlier—and turn it into concrete opportunities for those who want to stay one step ahead.
